steps.title: Identify what x and y represent
steps.content: From the problem, $x$ is the number of hours consulting and $y$ is the number of hours drawing up plans. The total earnings are $\$1{,}258$.

steps.title: Interpret the coefficients by units
steps.content: In $68x + 85y = 1{,}258$, each term must have units of dollars. Since $x$ has units of hours, the coefficient $68$ must have units of dollars per hour. Because $68$ multiplies $x$ (consulting hours), $68$ is the consulting hourly rate: $\$68$ per hour consulting.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• A) "$\$68$ per hour consulting": Matches the coefficient of $x$ in the model. Correct.
  • B) "Worked $68$ hours drawing up plans": Hours drawing up plans is $y$, not a fixed coefficient. Eliminated.
  • C) "$\$68$ per hour drawing up plans": The drawing-plans rate is $85$ (the coefficient of $y$), not $68$. Eliminated.
  • D) "Worked $68$ hours consulting": Hours consulting is $x$, not a fixed coefficient. Eliminated.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
